# Partition table for dashd with OTA sup: #   - nvs:      device prefs (theme
#   - otadata:  ESP-IDF rotates the active app slot through this
#   - app0:     first OTA slot — bootloader picks one based on otadata
#   - app1:     second OTA slot — receives the new image during OTA
#   - littlefs: pet bundles (a few hundred KB each
#   - coredump: panic backtrace dumps for post-mortem debugging
# Sizes:
#   app slots are 1.5 MB each. Current firmware is ~1 MB
#   growth headroom per slot before this needs revisiting.
#   littlefs is 0.8 MB
# Upgrade note: existing v0.1.1 devices have a single-app layout — moving
# to this table requires a one-time USB flash. After that
# either slot via the wire protocol's fw_update_* commands.
# Name
nvs
otadata
app0
app1
littlefs
coredump
